AssociatedWith: It is associated with the underground hip-hop scene.
It is associated with Definitive Jux.
It is associated with DJ Cip-One.
ConsistsOf: It consists of Vast Aire and Vordul Mega.
It consisted of Vast Aire and Vordul Mega.
CreatedIn: It was created in Harlem, New York, United States.
HasA: It has members Vast Aire and Vordul Mega.
It has DJ Cip-One as an accompanist.
It has a debut studio album titled The Cold Vein.
It has a live album titled Return of the Ox: Live at CMJ.
It has a second studio album titled Blade of the Ronin.
It has a studio album titled Live from the Aireport.
It has a studio album titled Aireplane.
It has a compilation album titled Gotham (Deluxe LP Edition).
It has a single titled "Iron Galaxy / DPA (As Seen on T.V.)".
It has a single titled "Vein / A B-Boy's Alpha".
IsA: It is an American hip-hop project.
KnownFor: It is known for its debut studio album The Cold Vein.
It is known for being among the first members of El-P's record label Definitive Jux.
It is known for the live album Return of the Ox: Live at CMJ.
It is known for the album Blade of the Ronin.
LocatedIn: It is located in Harlem, New York, United States.
MemberOf: It is a member of the New York underground hip-hop scene.
OccurredIn: It occurred in Harlem.
It occurred in New York.
It occurred in the 1990s.
It occurred in 2001.
It occurred in 2005.
It occurred in 2007.
It occurred in 2013.
It occurred in 2015.
It occurred in 2021.
It occurred in 2022.
OriginatedIn: It originated in Harlem, New York, United States.
ProducedBy: It was produced by Bill Cosmiq.
It was produced by Black Milk.
